title: Capture Infrastructure

schema_decisions.hash_length: 32 chars (SHA256 truncated) - sufficient for dedup, not storage-heavy
schema_decisions.analyzed_flag: Simple 0/1 integer - can extend to enum later if needed (0=pending, 1=analyzed, 2=lessons_extracted)
schema_decisions.content_hash_formula: sha256(original + '||' + improved)[:32] - separator prevents collision edge cases

notes_for_orchestrator: W2.1 (Diff Analyzer) should query: SELECT * FROM feedback_pairs WHERE analyzed = 0 ORDER BY created_at
Consider adding 'lessons_extracted_at' timestamp if you want to track when lessons were pulled, not just that they were
The content_type field is free-text - might want a canonical list in future to prevent 'cold_email' vs 'cold-email' drift
Script supports --conversation-id for provenance but it's optional - W2.1 could populate this retroactively from context
